## C2LLM Technical Report: Code Retrieval via Adaptive Cross-Attention

This skill implements techniques from the paper: C2LLM Technical Report: Code Retrieval via Adaptive Cross-Attention

### Core Concept

This paper presents a novel approach to solving important problems in machine learning and AI. The key innovation involves advanced methods that improve existing techniques.
